posts.title: Why We Started WNTS Media
posts.excerpt: A short note on why we exist, what We Need To Smile actually means, and what kind of work we want to make.
posts.body:
We started WNTS Media because too much brand work feels like homework — for the people making it and the people seeing it.

We Need To Smile is a reminder, not a slogan. Attention is everywhere and cheap. Affection is rare and earned. Our bet is that brands who make people feel something good — genuinely, not performatively — win the long game.

This blog is where we'll share the thinking behind our work, lessons from projects, and the occasional strong opinion about the creative industry. Glad you're here.
